title: Solana ETF inflows and staking yield integration
what_changed: Solana spot ETFs logged 11 consecutive inflow days through mid-May 2026, adding $100 million in cumulative inflows and bringing total assets to $1.05 billion. The source brief says the Bitwise Solana Staking ETF allows institutions to earn validator yield on top of price exposure while Ethereum ETFs bled $189 million over four days.
why_it_matters: The source brief frames staking-yield integration plus continued inflows as evidence of growing institutional comfort with SOL as an alternative to ETH inside a traditional ETF wrapper.
catalyst: The Solana Alpenglow upgrade going live on the community testnet on May 11 plus institutional disclosures of ETF positions.
risks: Network instability during mainnet upgrades could weaken the narrative.
Broader macro-driven ETF outflows could spill over into altcoin products.
invalidation_conditions: Solana ETFs post sustained consecutive days of net outflows.
The Alpenglow upgrade fails on mainnet.
boundary: No trading execution, buy/sell instruction, or portfolio mutation. Research and monitoring only.
